settings.title: You Can Now Book Online, Any Hour
settings.excerpt: Pick your stylist, see real openings, and rebook from your phone at midnight if you like.
settings.body:
We have heard you, and Shearline finally has proper online booking. No more phone tag during your lunch break.

For a long time the only way to book was to catch us between clients, which often meant a missed call and a note to ring back. That gap is now closed.

What you can do

You can choose your stylist, see their real availability, and lock in a time whenever it suits you, even at midnight. The system sends a reminder the day before so nobody forgets.

A few things the new system makes easy:

  • Pick the exact stylist you want, not just any open chair.
  • See genuine openings, updated as bookings come in.
  • Rebook or reschedule without waiting for opening hours.

The phone still works too

The phone still works, of course, and we are always happy to talk through what you want. Some appointments are easier to sort with a quick chat, especially big color changes or anything you are unsure about.

So treat online booking as one more option rather than the only one. If you would rather just tap and go, now you can. And if you would rather hear a friendly voice, we are still right here.
